## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on SEO fixes, define the newsletter workflow, and review performance.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**SEO Audit Fixes:** Datagrid to provide homepage metadata; GrowthX to fix category/static page metadata and an Airtable-syncing H1 bug. A new audit will run after Fran confirms all suffix blocks are removed.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [**Newsletter Workflow:** GrowthX will now source content directly from Lindsay via a new shared Slack channel, streamlining the process and reducing Kaitlin's workload.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
  - [**First Newsletter Edition:** The first draft is due early next week. It will feature the Agentathon (using LinkedIn posts as a placeholder), a new Trimble 0-60 blog, and a spotlight on a new AI agent from a hidden showcase page.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:** GA4 data is unreliable due to a tagging issue, blocking accurate content cohort analysis. Fixing this is a high priority.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)

## Topics

### SEO Audit & Fixes

  - [GrowthX's SEO specialist reviewed Fran's audit comments.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [**Datagrid Responsibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
      - [Provide homepage title/description metadata.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [**GrowthX Responsibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [Improve metadata on all category and static pages.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [Fix an H1 bug where new blogs pull titles from Airtable instead of their assigned titles.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [**Resolved/In Progress:**](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [Schema is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [Fran is removing suffix blocks (confirmed on a prior call).](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [Fran has the doc to remove broken external links.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [**Next Audit:** A new 48-hour audit will run after Fran confirms all suffix blocks are removed.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

### Newsletter Workflow & Content

  - [**New Workflow:** GrowthX will source content directly from Lindsay (social/email lead) via a new shared Slack channel, bypassing Kaitlin.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
  - [**First Edition Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
      - [**Agentathon:** Initial content will be from Datagrid's LinkedIn posts. A video is pending approval from an interviewed person's company; photos are a backup.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
      - [**Events Page:** Fran is building a central events page to serve as the long-term source of truth for the newsletter.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
      - [**Trimble 0-60:** A new blog post is written but awaiting Vivek's review before publication.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
      - [**AI Agent Spotlight:** GrowthX will use a hidden showcase page (link to be shared by Kaitlin) to highlight a new agent (e.g., Memory Agent), transcribing its video for copy.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [**Review Process:** GrowthX will stage the draft in HubSpot for Kaitlin's review, mirroring Lindsay's current workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)

### Programmatic SEO & Performance

  - [**Programmatic SEO:** The initiative is on track.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
      - [**Next Step:** Schedule a meeting with Thiago to finalize page designs, incorporating his feedback from May.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is required before spec'ing pages with web devs, as the CMS needs modification to support the new structure.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
      - [**Goal:** Begin content production in January.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
      - [**Google Search Console:** Traffic is stable.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
      - [**GA4:** Data is unreliable due to a tagging issue, preventing accurate content cohort analysis. Fixing this is a high priority.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kaitlin:**](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)

      - [Add Lindsay to the new shared Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
      - [Share the link to the hidden AI agent showcase page.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [Schedule the programmatic SEO meeting with Thiago.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
      - [Fix category/static page metadata and the H1 bug.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [Stage the first newsletter draft in HubSpot for review by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
      - [Follow up with Fran to confirm suffix block removal.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [Follow up with Xander regarding product update content.](https://fathom.video/share/MixvNV3Zd_DN-Gc-TPYD4M6x1dbrZczG?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
